Product Features

  • Exquisite Workmanship: Wall mounted cabinet feature with solid MDF construction. It is sturdy and durable, smooth paint finish ensures safe use and make it looks elegant. Which will provide extra space to entryway or anywhere that its needed in the home.
  • Enough Storage Space: Top level has 3 built-in cubbies and use the top shelf and the storage compartment to display your favorite decorations or freshen up the hallway with cute plants or photos.
  • Special Hook Design: Bottom level has a row of 4 hooks for hanging various articles of clothing such as coats, hats and purses. You could design your favorite height and put everything in reach. Getting ready for the day just became easier.
  • Lightweight & Easy to Assemble: Easy assemble is required with all hardware packed in the package and easy clean surface are suitable for home using. Bring it home and welcome your friends with a tidy and clean entryway. Material: MDF panel and steel hooks Dimension: 38.58"x 7.87"x 13.78"(L x W x H inch)
